backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point for the ICP canister. Contains no logic or methods.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (WhyVerdraExists component, Home page integration) to their source files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON dictionary providing one-line summaries of every frontend source file, serving as a quick reference for the project's component and configuration structure.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base CSS file defining OKLCH-based design tokens for light and dark themes, including background, foreground, card, border, and chart color variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the VERDRA app that loads Google Fonts (Montserrat, Poppins, Cormorant Garamond, Lora) and mounts the React app via the root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes Navigation, Home page, and Footer inside a dark-background full-height layout.
Renders five scroll-revealed glassmorphism benefit cards with hover elevation effects and a cinematic mission statement panel displaying the '1 Lakh Trees by End of 2026' goal with a progress bar.
frontend/src/components/ContributeSectio: Displays a premium tree sponsorship section with a ₹2000 price badge, Tirupati location info, a three-step process visual, and a disabled 'Contributions Opening Soon' CTA button.
frontend/src/components/ExpansionVisionS: Vertical storytelling section with two full-width parallax map panels (Andhra Pradesh and India) showing expansion phases, scroll-reveal animations, and an animated arrow connector between panels.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Renders the site footer with the Verdra logo, tagline, smooth-scroll nav links, copyright, and a caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section with a parallax forest background, animated floating leaves, light rays, and a scroll-down chevron linking to the Life Cycle section.
frontend/src/components/LifeCycleSection: Displays a six-stage plant life cycle grid with scroll-reveal animated cards, each showing a stage image, numbered badge, name, and description.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with a Verdra logo, desktop and mobile menus, active-section highlighting via scroll detection, and smooth-scroll link handling.
frontend/src/components/ShowcaseCards.ts: Renders a three-card image grid showcasing urban greening impact, with scroll-reveal animations, hover zoom, and overlay tagline pills.
Section explaining Verdra's mission using animated floating leaves, light rays, and three hover-interactive icon cards covering community, air quality, and tree planting themes.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) actors, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider context and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder file with no exports, indicating no backend queries are needed for this static frontend.
frontend/src/hooks/useScrollReveal.ts: Exports a useScrollReveal hook using IntersectionObserver to trigger visibility state on scroll, and a useParallax hook that applies a translateY transform based on scroll position.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining the VERDRA brand color palette via CSS custom properties (oklch), Tailwind base/components/utilities layers, glassmorphism utilities, glow effects, gradient text, and scroll-reveal/parallax animation classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Home page component that composes all major landing page sections: Hero, ShowcaseCards, WhyVerdraExists, ContributeSection, LifeCycle, Benefits, and ExpansionVision.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with VERDRA brand colors (oklch-based semantic tokens and hex brand colors), custom font families, border radii, box shadows, and enabling typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata describing VERDRA as a multi-page premium environmental website with 5 pages, documenting design system choices, existing implemented features, known issues, and image requirements.
